review_title: AI Powered Efficiency for Multi Location Brands
description: It took a little time to get used to all the features, but once I did, it was clear how much time and stress it saved. Seeing the insights and analytics helped me understand how customers were finding and interacting with each location, and that made decision-making so much easier
author: Merihan S.
pros: What I liked most about Uberall was how easy it makes managing everything in one place.the AI tools save a ton of time especially the Review Assistant, which helps respond to customer feedback quickly
cons: some very specific workflows or integrations may require workarounds or additional tech support. Having listings, reviews, social posts, and customer messages in a single dashboard makes local marketing less fragmented

description: Overall, I have enjoyed my experience using Momentfeed. There are many added features that we have through momentfeed that we didn't previously have access to with birdeye (Insights and reporting section, paid media)
author: Melody A.
pros: My favorite aspect of MomentFeed is the Paid Media Module. The Paid Media Module is where you can create Facebook Ads. What I love about the Paid Media Module is how much more detailed you can make your ad campaigns versus going directly through Facebook. Momentfeed makes it easy to optimize your campaigns objective, delivery, and call to action. I also enjoy how I can create a campaign for all 3 of my stores at once. Previously I was boosting each store's post individually, which was much less detailed and a lot more work.
cons: One thing I do not like about MomentFeed is the reputation management tool. We previously used birdeye and all reviews were left in one place. On MomentFeed, I have to filter through each platform to view and respond to reviews (Yelp, Google, Facebook, etc...).

author: Natalie F.
pros: The dashboards were intuitive, especially after the most recent round of updates. Customer service was responsive.
cons: The updates that were supposed to be aggregated across 300+ sites sometimes worked, and sometimes did not. Out dashboard indicated that our information health was 100% but after a brief spit check of some of the live listings, that was not the case.

review_title: Multiple locations? Need help managing them? Uberall is your key
description: In order to maintain our directory listings (mainly Google) Uberall allowed the business to solve this easily. Location managers are added per location to manage their individual directory. Benefits are the improved local SEO and brand online reputation management.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The ease of implementation and changes
cons: I really can't think of any right now.

description: Positive experience, pleased with how training is going
author: Lauren C.
pros: Accurate tracking for google and Facebook reviews
cons: dashboard glitches as far as store inaccuracies go

description: I really like Uberall and would recommend it to anyone that is in need of this software. I rave about it to my clients, providing a lot of value in why Uberall is important in not only getting your information out quickly, but across as many search engines.
author: Lauren G.
pros: How fast the information gets pushed out to endless listings. It is fascinating how accurate the connections of data and everything else as well. I also appreciate how fast the customer service team responds.
cons: The accuracy of the photos. Many times the cover photos don’t sync to Google or other listings and I am left with these important logos sitting there. Although, when I reach out to the team they are very helpful. I just wish I didn’t have to take that extra step if that feature is available.

review_title: One dashboard to manage every local listing
description: Despite occasional sync hiccups, Uberall has reduced the drudge work of maintaining listings and helped us respond to customer reviews much faster. It is a solid upgrade from managing each platform separately.
author: Maike E.
pros: Uberall pulls all major review sites and business profiles into a single hub, making it simple to update hours, publish posts, and reply to feedback without juggling multiple logins. The sentiment analysis highlights reviews that need attention first, and the AI description tool saves a surprising amount of time when writing location blurbs. Pricing feels fair for the convenience, and the account team stays proactive without upselling.
cons: Sync warnings appear now and then with certain profiles and require a manual refresh or quick support ticket. Reporting is serviceable but could offer more flexible filters and region-level dashboards without requiring an export.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: MomentFeed is an innovative digital partner that provides excellent account service.
description: MomentFeed is a fantastic partner that’s always looking to improve their platform. Their account service means you’re never more than an email or call away from a solution to any problem.
author: John B.
pros: MomentFeed allows us to manage listings, reputation and local social for more that 255 stores with a small marketing team of 3 people. Their customer support and account service makes them a fantastic partner.
cons: We need better and more flexible reporting - similar to Google Analytics. Sometimes the new features can be buggy and take time to work through. Time zone differences present communication challenges.

author: Paola A.
pros: Uberall is flexible and allows for customization based on our specific business needs. It adapts to our industry and target audience, which is essential for any successful local marketing strategy.
cons: Consider conducting a trial period or seeking recommendations from businesses similar to yours to ensure it's the right fit for your local marketing strategy.

description: we did not take directly services from it, a my client managed it, Overall they provide best services to be recognised worldwide i.e to be appeared SEO, brand image. Digital marketing is became so easier with thier analytics, we used it to manage,track location for customer support technicians.
author: Mudssar A.
pros: Awsome tool to collect locaton information, thier best team modify yor business needs accordingly when you have multiple location business and complex role, Love thier working with APIs.
cons: Initially found some bugs which were resolved in 3 emails. overall not such constraint found. They can introduce a GUI based automated system to generate general customer requirements, instead of devolping every thing new for customer.

review_title: Gestiona la reputación de tu pequeño negocio con Uberall CoreX
description: Mi experiencia con Uberall CoreX es muy satisfactoria. Gracias a la gran cantidad de funciones que tiene, me supone un gran ahorro de tiempo. Y lo resultados son muy visibles a medio plazo o en el momento que ya sepamos manejar bien las herrmientas.
author: Iñigo M.
pros: Lo que más me gusta es el precio por sitio y número de directorios dirigidos a mi tienda, con la opción de diseñar páginas personalizadas con el productor.Además dispone de numerosas funciones de optimización para incrementar la visibilidad de las empresas locales que quieren estar presentes en Internet.Las herramientas de control son bastante intuitivas, en particular tras las recientes actualizaciones. El servicio de atención al cliente es muy útil.Existen grupos de administradores de sitios web por ubicación para gestionar cada uno de los distintos directorios. Gracias a ello se mejora el SEO local y la gestión de la reputación de la marca en línea.
cons: Tanto si eres un principiante como un experto en marketing, tienes que aprender a utilizar la herramienta y sus posibilidades, lo que puede suponer una curva de aprendizaje pronunciada.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Buena herramienta para mejorar la presencia local online
description: Ayuda a mejorar la reputación online en diferentes industrias.
author: Pablo P.
pros: Ofrece varias funcionalidades de optimización para mejorar la visibilidad de negocios locales que también quieren tener presencia online.
cons: El hecho de tener que pedir una valoración de mis necesidades para poder conocer el precio de la herramienta.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Guenter C.
pros: easy to use and good for dayly Control of the Status of our homepage
cons: there is nothing to criticize. Everything is okay

description: Overall I've had a great experience. The pros definitely outweigh the cons for me. Like I mentioned, it's very hands off so I can spend my time doing other things. Customer support is really helpful with any issues I do have. The posting feature is my most used feature probably.
author: Sammi V.
pros: That it is a very hands off system and I don't need to be constantly monitoring each of my clients and their profiles.
cons: There are a bunch of times when information has not been updated on platforms that it said it was updated on.

author: Valentina P.
pros: Me gusto mucho su servicio al cliente, su interfas graficas y las herramientas que contiene es muy util.
cons: No me quejo me ha funcionado de maravilla.

description: I am pleased with MomentFeed, and I have not experienced anything wrong with it and whenever I needed support, their customer support was on top of their game and provided what I needed every time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: MomentFeed shows potential customers we actually take customer feedback seriously, we are always at reach with MomentFeed since we've been able to respond to at least 97% of reviews both negative and positive with a natural sense of being as direct as possible to the customers concerns.
cons: It is quite expensive for the non experienced and mid-experienced marketer and it comes with a little bit of a learning curve to make the most of it, in which you have to adapt yourself to the application and its features.

author: Michael H.
pros: We administrate our more than 120 shops in Germany and Switzerland with ease and an outstandig performance in multiple directories and navigations systems. We also generate our shop sites with uberall, they are modern, light und highly optimized for search.
cons: It is industry neutral, maybe we have a little more success if we optimize our profile by hand instead of uberall, but now we have 80% of success in 20 % of time (80:20).

review_title: Exceptional Customer Service, Easy to Use and Accurate
description: My overall experience has been positive and I've recommended MomentFeed to others looking for this type of software.
author: Nikki R.
pros: I love that I can easily navigate the dashboard and make changes or postings with just a few clicks. I save so much time with MomentFeed than having to do it manually for all pages and locations.
cons: Sometimes the cost can be a prohibitor but it's well worth it if you look at it with man hours. MomentFeed is great at working with you to find the best solution for you within your budget.

author: Lauren P.
pros: The MomentFeed team is incredible to work with. They are easy to access and solve problems quickly. They are making massive strides in development this year to what was already a great product. MomentFeed has made Social Media and Reputation Manage simple for our locations and convenient for us to monitor on a corporate level. MomentFeed has been a game-changer for Taziki's!
cons: I love that we have the ability to track the performance of keywords, but the platform needs to be updated for a better user experience.

author: Fabian N.
pros: Alle Brancheneinträge inkl. Google MyBusiness können über dieses Tool komfortabel und einfach gepflegt werden. Unsere Google-Bewertungen werden ebenfalls über uberall verwaltet und kommentiert. Der Support ist schnell und zuverlässig ...
cons: Die Google-Ads Funktion ist eher für kleine Betriebe mit wenig Werbeaufkommen geeignet.

author: Thomas I.
pros: The customer support as well as the fast overviews about every kind of statistical data.
cons: Several problems connecting google mybusiness entrys with the software. Had to call Rep sometimes to fix bugs related to it.

review_title: Straight forward software that works perfectly.
author: Ben F.
pros: Everyone is able to use the software because its very straight forward to use. All the functions are thought through very well. You save a lot of time using this tool.
cons: I need four accounts to get four bills (since we have shops in different countries). I would like to set it all together.

review_title: uberall has a powerful local listing tool
description: Uberall is a great company, very customer-driven with a high level of service and advice for their clients.
author: Anna R.
pros: The software is easy to use and easy to learn. The news section (within the tool) gives useful information about new software features and new market insights.
cons: A nice-to-have feature for "special opening hours" would be a time span. A possibility to display vacation/holiday times.

author: Mitch B.
pros: It aggregates all of the social listening and rep tools in one place
cons: Many levels of options-maybe a bot too many

description: MomentFeed has made the planning and execution of our local digital strategy seamless. On the rare occasions when something does go wrong, support has been immediate and very helpful in resolving the issue.
author: Vicki O.
pros: The ability to plan posts in advance and deploy on our schedule.
cons: I really don't have a con to report. We have had it go down a couple of times, but it was resolved quickly.
